title: Aldasorea saundersii

Aldasorea saundersii is a shrub that grows to a height of around 2 meters. The plant is known for its small, greenish-white flowers and its ability to thrive in sandy soils. Aldasorea saundersii is classified as a member of the genus Aldasorea, which is a small group of plants within the Celastraceae family.
